arts.ttl: Slavko Vinčić will referee Bayern Munich’s Champions League showdown against FC Barcelona
arts.sum: As is the case for most of Bayern Munich ’s Champions League games, the club almost always gets dodgy referees (mostly English) during huge matchups in the quest to win Ol’ Big Ears. In the current campaign, the Bavarians have one win (9-2 vs Dinamo Zagreb) and one loss (1-0 to Aston Villa ) so far and sit 15 th on the 32-team table.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Alumni: David Alaba not thinking of retirement, but returning to play for Real Madrid
arts.sum: David Alaba has not had the most fortunate time since moving to Real Madrid from Bayern Munich a couple years ago. If we find an ideal player for Real Madrid, we won’t rule out a signing.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Harvey Vale, Joshua Kimmich, Ronald Araujo
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in latest Argentinian talent as 15-year-old impresses scouts
arts.sum: Barcelona are one of many top clubs heavily involved in the Latin American market for the best young talents, and believe they have identified another potential star. Argentinian starlet Felipe Esquivel was one of the standouts at the under-15 South American Championships. arts.ttl: Xavi risks uncomfortable reunion with one Man United star if he succeeds Erik ten Hag as quotes resurface - after former Barca boss held talks with Red Devils
arts.sum: Mail Sport revealed that the intermediaries have made contact with the former Barcelona star and manager twice in recent months.

arts.ttl: Five epic Barca-Bayern Champions League matches
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayern Munich will meet each other for the 11th time in Champions League history when they face off on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: How might FC Barcelona lineup for Champions League clash against Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Flick will go all out to try to beat Bayern and make a statement on the big Champions League stage with the Bundesliga side employing a very similar style of football to the Blaugrana with high pressure and intensity throughout the 90 minutes in what should be a spectacular meeting. A big night is in store at the Lluís Companys in the Catalan capital as Hansi Flick’s Barcelona host Bayern Munich in matchday three of the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League phase (kick-off 3pm ET) in a match that will gauge Barça’s aspirations in the top European competition against one of the favourites.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Bayern Munich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The standout fixture of Matchday 3 in the 2024/25 Champions League league phase arrives in Catalonia on Wednesday night as Barcelona host Bayern Munich. Here is 90min's guide to Barcelona vs Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United make contact with ex-Barcelona manager about replacing Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Xavi Hernandez did not leave the club in the most ideal fashion, sacked just weeks after the club had given him a public show of confidence, and he stepped back from his resignation. arts.ttl: Why Kompany managing Bayern is 'not a risk'
arts.sum: Nedum Onuoha discusses how his former Manchester City team-mate Vincent Kompany will lead Bayern Munich in this season's Champions League.
